<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. Please keep the description focused on
behavior change, not implementation detail. For anything larger than a
small fix, open an issue or Discussion first.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR does and why. -->
<!-- If this PR is stacked on an in-flight PR (i.e. base is not `main`),
     add "Stacked on: #N" near the top so reviewers see the dependency. -->

## Linked quest or issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #12" or "QUEST-14 from the internal board". Leave blank if neither applies. -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (fmt + vet + lint + sqlcheck + test-race)
- [ ] New behavior covered by a test
- [ ] Manually exercised via `guild` CLI or MCP client (describe below)

<!-- Describe manual verification, sample commands, before/after output. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything you're unsure about, trade-offs taken, follow-ups you'd like. -->
